# LifecycleRecord.Expedited property

Whether a security-driven, shortened deprecation window applies (a minimum of 90 days rather than the standard 12 months) (R-27.2-k, R-27.2-l). Defaults to `false`.

```csharp
public bool Expedited { get; set; }
```
